The '''Marcellus Nebula''' was a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] located within the [[Marcellus system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{Neb-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of the Mists]]''
